# Daily Report ‚Äî 2026-05-22

## Task Completed
Added `cancel_change_request` and `reopen_change_request` lifecycle tools to `change_tools.py`.

- `cancel_change_request`: PATCHes `state=-1` (Cancelled) on a change request; accepts number or sys_id; optional `cancellation_reason` stored as work notes.
- `reopen_change_request`: PATCHes state back to New (`-5`, default) or Assess (`-4`); accepts number or sys_id; optional `work_notes`; state label included in success message.

Both tools reuse the existing `_resolve_change_request_sys_id` helper for number‚Üísys_id resolution and are registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages.
